header: See it before you install it
subheadline: The Visual Editor and the themed frontend, exactly as they ship — select any thumbnail to view it at full size.

image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor with inline editing of a Desiderio content element on the page.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Edit on the page itself
items.description: The Visual Editor turns the frontend into the editing surface — click a Desiderio element, change it inline, watch it update live.

image.title: Desiderio frontend on the Lagoon preset
image.alternative: Desiderio demo site hero page rendered in the light Lagoon theme preset.
image.description: Frontend screenshot of a TYPO3 site built with Desiderio.

items.title: A frontend that ships finished
items.description: The seeded demo site on the Lagoon preset — this is what your TYPO3 site looks like minutes after composer require.

image.title: Desiderio pricing page in dark Midnight preset
image.alternative: Desiderio demo pricing page rendered in the dark Midnight theme preset.
image.description: Frontend screenshot of a TYPO3 site built with Desiderio.

items.title: Dark mode, zero extra work
items.description: The pricing page on the Midnight preset — every one of the 15 themes ships a dark scheme with WCAG 2.2-checked contrast.
